maps.name: The Crossroads v2
maps.blurb: City intersection. Buildings guard every corner — take cover, push through, destroy what you can't go around. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: Woodpecker Hill v2
maps.blurb: Forested hilltops flank a twin-road corridor. Forest blocks line-of-sight — move fast or get flanked. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: Dune Pass v2
maps.blurb: Sandy ridgelines and two fast roads through the dunes. Ruins in the center offer grim cover. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: Frozen Crossing v2
maps.blurb: Frozen river splits the map. Two bridges — control them both or hold the ice line. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: Staging Grounds v2
maps.blurb: Training area with every terrain type. Hills, forest, ruins, and roads in a compact kill box. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: Occupied District v2
maps.blurb: Multi-block city sector. Buildings create corridors and ambush pockets across three city rows. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: Green Choke v2
maps.blurb: Thick forest flanks a river. Two road crossings become life-or-death choke points. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: Outpost Bravo v2
maps.blurb: Desert fortification at the center. Dune ridges offer elevation. Crossing the open costs units. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: Northern Passage v2
maps.blurb: Snow and frozen lakes create a maze. Two road corridors are the only safe routes through. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: Factory District v2
maps.blurb: Industrial zone with urban buildings and forested perimeter. Hills provide sniper elevation. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: City Quarter v2
maps.blurb: A large city grid with four road arteries and dense building clusters. Rubble from destroyed buildings creates dynamic cover. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: Forest Valley v2
maps.blurb: A river splits the valley floor. Two bridge crossings under dense forest fire — flanking is key. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: Desert Ruins v2
maps.blurb: Abandoned settlement surrounded by open desert. Dunes hide movement; ruins provide the only real cover. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: Tundra Siege v2
maps.blurb: Frozen lakes and scattered forests create a deadly puzzle. Two roads thread the only navigable paths. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: River Delta v2
maps.blurb: River branches create islands of high ground. Urban strongpoints, hills, and water barriers divide the battlefield. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: Fallen City v2
maps.blurb: A massive urban warzone. Three horizontal boulevards cross a grid of destructible city blocks. Every building can become rubble. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: The Great Forest v2
maps.blurb: Rivers branch through a vast forested landscape. Hills command the crossings. Long-range units thrive in the clearings. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: Desert Warzone v2
maps.blurb: Vast desert with twin oases and three road arteries. Ancient ruins and dune ridges anchor the flanks. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: Arctic Front v2
maps.blurb: Massive frozen battlefield. A central ice lake dominates — two road bridges are the only links. Forest and hills guard the perimeter. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]

maps.name: Liberation Campaign v2
maps.blurb: Grand cross-terrain battle. Urban buildings, forest ridges, desert dunes, frozen lakes, and river barriers all collide in one massive map. [v2: procedural rivers, 2-tile corridor rule, flowConnectors.]
